$comment: Governance: written by Builder tier (Claude, 2026-06-16); validates skill YAML frontmatter. Field names are codename-neutral per Constitution §1.3.
title: Skill Frontmatter

name.description: Kebab-case identifier. Used as the /slash-command name when installed.

description.description: One sentence: what this skill does and when to invoke it. Shown during agent selection.

tools.description: Claude Code tools this skill requires. Omit if skill delegates tool selection to the agent.

model.description: Preferred model family. Omit to inherit from the calling agent.

profile.description: Minimum library profile that includes this skill.

maturity.description: canonical = stable, team-vetted; experimental = in trial; archived = superseded.

origin.description: Source library or author. Use 'kst_promptware' for first-party skills.
